title: Department Manager Vacancy at Khadim's Capital India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Khadim's Capital India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Khadim's Capital India! We are hiring a Department Manager for our Ranchi team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Khadim's Capital India:
Khadim's Capital India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Referral bonus program
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Khadim's Capital India!
